title: cyclosorus gongylodes
intro: Cyclosorus gongylodes, also known as the 'Dandelion Fern', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyclosorus gongylodes include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as a natural diuretic. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, often mixed with other herbal remedies to enhance its medicinal properties.
